edge_hypothesis: Supertrend tail harvesters hold the system PF record (1.92 at 8:1 R:R). The key discovery from recent cycles is that ADX relaxation IMPROVES performance: ADX>20 (original) < ADX>10 (PF=1.91) < ADX>5 (untested frontier). The logical extrapolation: what happens at ADX>1 (effectively no ADX filter)? The Supertrend direction flip (SUPERTd_7_3.0 changing sign) is ITSELF a regime signal — it only triggers when price definitively crosses the trailing stop band, which requires genuine directional commitment. The ADX filter is therefore a REDUNDANT confirmation that unnecessarily reduces trade count. At 85-99 trades (current ADX>5-10 range), adding more signals by removing ADX could push trade count toward 120-150, improving statistical significance while maintaining the core Supertrend edge. Additionally, we test the R:R frontier: 12:1 is completely untested but mathematically viable (only 10% win rate needed). If supertrend's proven ability to capture regime shifts extends to 12x ATR moves, this becomes the highest-expectancy variant in the system. Regime assumption: ALL REGIMES (proven). Invalidation: if removing ADX drops PF below 1.3 or increases DD above 15%, ADX IS providing meaningful signal filtration and should be kept at its relaxed level (5-10).

variants.name: supertrend_no_adx_12to1
variants.description: Supertrend flip on ETH/4h with NO ADX filter (adx_min=1) and extreme 12:1 R:R (2.0x ATR stop, 24.0x ATR TP). The maximum-signal variant: Supertrend flip alone determines entry, with no ADX gatekeeping. Tests whether the Supertrend direction change is sufficient without momentum confirmation. The 2.0x ATR stop gives adequate breathing room for 4h noise. At 12:1 R:R, only 10% win rate needed — if even 1 in 10 Supertrend flips leads to a 24x ATR trend, this is highly profitable.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 1 (effectively no ADX filter — testing Supertrend-only signal).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
ADX minimum: 1 (no effective ADX gate — Supertrend flip is the sole entry trigger)
Regime gate: ADX_14 used for regime classification only, not entry filtering
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (24.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure: if PF < 1.3 without ADX, the filter IS providing signal value and should be kept at 5-10
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 24.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — sole entry signal, no ADX confirmation required
ADX_14 > 1 (effectively disabled) — testing if Supertrend flip alone is sufficient
ATR_14 for stop/TP — 2.0x stop / 24.0x TP for extreme 12:1 R:R

variants.name: supertrend_adx3_10to1
variants.description: Supertrend flip on ETH/4h with ultra-relaxed ADX>3 and 10:1 R:R (2.0x ATR stop, 20.0x ATR TP). A bridge variant between proven ADX>5 (PF=1.91) and no-ADX. ADX>3 keeps a minimal momentum floor — only filtering out the absolute flattest, most directionless markets — while capturing almost all Supertrend flips. The 10:1 R:R sits between proven 8:1 (PF=1.92) and untested 12:1, helping map the R:R frontier.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
ADX minimum: 3 (ultra-relaxed, only filtering dead-flat markets)
Regime gate: ADX_14 used for regime classification
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (20.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure: if trade count < 90, ADX>3 isn't meaningfully different from ADX>5
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 20.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: ADX_14 > 3 — ultra-relaxed, bridging ADX>5 (proven) and no-ADX (experimental)
ATR_14 for stop/TP — 2.0x stop / 20.0x TP for 10:1 R:R

variants.name: supertrend_adx5_1h_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend flip on ETH/1h with proven ADX>5 and 8:1 R:R (1.5x ATR stop, 12.0x ATR TP). Timeframe diversification variant. The system record PF=1.92 is on 4h. But 1h generates 4x more Supertrend flips, meaning more trades and faster statistical convergence. The hypothesis: if Supertrend flips on 4h capture genuine regime changes, 1h flips capture the same changes PLUS intermediate momentum shifts. ADX>5 is the proven relaxed level, and 8:1 is the proven best R:R. This variant transplants the exact winning formula to 1h.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
ADX minimum: 5 (proven relaxed level from 4h ACCEPT)
Regime gate: ADX_14 used for regime classification
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure: if PF < 1.3 on 1h vs 1.92 on 4h, the extra 1h noise degrades Supertrend signal quality
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — proven signal, now tested on 1h timeframe
ADX_14 > 5 — proven relaxed level, testing if it transfers from 4h to 1h
ATR_14 for stop/TP — 1.5x stop / 12.0x TP for 8:1 R:R on 1h
